verbGlossary.MANAGED BY: {source} is responsible for maintaining model standards, content, and updates
verbGlossary.OVERSEEN BY: {source} provides design oversight and approval of model content
verbGlossary.ASSEMBLED BY: {source} merges discipline models into the federated coordination model
verbGlossary.REVIEWED BY: {source} reviews model for constructability and coordination completeness
verbGlossary.LINKED BY: {source} links schedule activities to model elements for 4D simulation
verbGlossary.POPULATED BY: {source} enters cost data into model elements for 5D estimation
verbGlossary.VALIDATED BY: {source} checks model cost quantities against independent estimates
verbGlossary.RUN BY: {source} executes automated clash detection analyses on the federated model
verbGlossary.RESOLVED BY: {target} drives resolution of coordination issues identified in {source}
verbGlossary.IMPLEMENTED BY: {source} executes field corrections based on coordination issue resolutions
verbGlossary.FACILITATED BY: {source} leads BIM coordination meetings and tracks action items
verbGlossary.ATTENDED BY: {source} participates in coordination meetings to address field impacts
verbGlossary.EXTRACTED BY: {target} pulls material quantities from {source} for estimating
verbGlossary.ISSUED BY: {source} issues model-based drawings to the field for construction
verbGlossary.CONTROLLED BY: {source} manages drawing revisions, transmittals, and version control
verbGlossary.VERIFIED BY: {source} verifies as-built model accuracy against installed field conditions
verbGlossary.PROCESSED BY: {source} processes raw scan data into usable point cloud models
verbGlossary.REQUESTED BY: {source} initiates drone capture flights for progress or site documentation
verbGlossary.TAKEN BY: {source} captures construction photos documenting daily field conditions
verbGlossary.CAPTURED BY: {source} captures 360-degree photos for progress and quality documentation
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONED BY: {source} establishes and commissions the digital twin for operations handover
verbGlossary.ADMINISTERED BY: {source} manages the technology platform and integrations for the digital twin
verbGlossary.SPECIFIED BY: {source} defines the Level of Development requirements for each project phase
verbGlossary.REPORTED TO: {source} coordination adoption score reported to leadership for process tracking
